meta.note: You found the API version. If you're reading this, you're probably the kind of engineer I want to work with.

summary: Senior backend engineer with 7+ years building production systems across fintech, SaaS, and internal platforms. Expert in Python, Django, and FastAPI. I care about systems that are correct, not just fast. I think in invariants before tables, explicit logic before clever abstractions, and idempotency before optimism.

highlights: Integrated production ML workflows using AWS SageMaker for model-driven product features
Engineered compliance-ready platforms with secure API integrations and reliable delivery workflows
Led 5+ engineers, reduced production bugs 25%, accelerated delivery by 6 weeks
Reduced API latency 60% via PostgreSQL indexing and Redis caching
Architected Django and FastAPI backends for 5k DAU, 300 RPM production platforms
Scaled RESTful APIs for 7+ clients handling 5-7 GB daily data throughput
Built Celery task queues for 15+ daily background jobs with zero missed deliveries
Led a 3-person team to ship an e-commerce platform for 500 concurrent users
Maintained a Django attendance system with 99% production uptime

open_source.name: django-system-audit
open_source.tagline: Signals capture effects. Compliance systems need to capture intent.

open_source.name: timeblocks
open_source.tagline: Scheduling breaks when availability is modelled as mutable state, not invariants.

open_source.tagline: Debugging a strange ML prediction from last month should not require excavating logs across 5 services.

open_source.name: session-bridge-ai

principles: Explicit state transitions over implicit side effects
Fail loudly, log clearly, recover deterministically
